events.emptyDescription: Events will appear here when data is available.

featured.emptyDescription: When events are loaded, they will appear here.

demo.title: URL, Server Components and Client Components
demo.description: A small lab for safe experiments before patterns move into EventMap.
demo.courseDescription: A training project for SEO, i18n and App Router patterns.

seo.title: SEO
seo.text: Start with page structure and basic metadata.

i18n.title: i18n
i18n.text: Keep locale in the URL before translating the interface.

patterns.title: App Router patterns
patterns.text: Separate pages, shared UI and simple server components.

demo.clientDescription: This counter runs in the browser.
demo.controlledSourceCardDescription: Compare controlled event ids with live Ticketmaster ids before static detail pages are built.
demo.controlledSourceDescription: Static detail pages use controlled ids. Live Ticketmaster ids stay outside the static page list.
demo.controlledSourceControlledDescription: These ids are safe for generateStaticParams and can be opened as detail pages.
demo.controlledSourceLiveDescription: This is a sample external id. It is not part of the controlled static list.
demo.cachePolicyCardDescription: Compare controlled content, live fetch cache and preview no-store.
demo.cachePolicyDescription: EventMap uses different cache rules for controlled content, live API data and demo preview scenarios.
demo.cacheControlledDescription: Static detail pages use internal controlled data and do not depend on Ticketmaster during build.
demo.cacheLiveDescription: Live API helpers use fetch revalidation and tags for future invalidation.
demo.cachePreviewDescription: Preview-like scenarios can opt out of caching with no-store.
demo.liveCacheCardDescription: See how live Ticketmaster data returns to EventMap with cache policy.
demo.liveCacheDescription: Live Ticketmaster data is separate from controlled detail pages and uses fetch revalidation.
demo.liveCacheControlledDescription: Featured controlled events stay predictable and link to static detail pages.
demo.liveCacheLiveDescription: Live events use Ticketmaster helpers with revalidate and tags.
demo.clientSearchCardDescription: See why results loaded after useEffect are weak for SEO.
demo.clientSearchDescription: This demo waits for the browser before showing event results.
demo.clientSearchWeakTitle: Why this is weak for SEO
demo.clientSearchWeakDescription: The first server-rendered HTML has no event cards, no result-specific heading and no stable landing page copy.
demo.clientSearchInitialState: Initial HTML: results are not loaded yet.
demo.clientSearchLoadedState: Browser mounted: results appeared after useEffect.
demo.searchSegmentsCardDescription: See how [[...segments]] turns clean search URLs into server filters.
demo.searchSegmentsDescription: Clean search URLs can carry category and city in the path while q stays in the query string.
demo.searchSegmentsCatchAllDescription: [...segments] catches nested paths. [[...segments]] is optional, so it also covers the base /search route.
demo.searchNavigationCardDescription: Active filters, reset links and pagination without client state.
demo.searchNavigationDescription: Search navigation can stay URL-driven and server-rendered.
demo.searchNavigationCleanUrlDescription: Category and city stay in path segments, so filters are shareable and crawlable.
demo.searchNavigationActiveDescription: The active filter comes from the normalised URL state, not from local component state.
demo.searchNavigationResetDescription: Reset is a plain Link back to the base search route.
demo.searchNavigationPaginationDescription: The current page lives in searchParams as ?page=2 and is rendered on the server.
demo.searchNavigationLinkDescription: Use Link for basic SEO filters. router.push belongs to interactive client flows such as debounced inputs or wizard-like UI.
demo.liveSearchSourceCardDescription: See how product search tries Ticketmaster first and falls back to controlled events.
demo.seoBaselineCardDescription: Check title, description, canonical, hreflang, sitemap and robots in the final SEO baseline.
demo.parallelRoutesCardDescription: See how a layout can render children and @modal slot at the same time.
demo.modalVsFullPageCardDescription: Compare a UX modal route with a full SEO detail page.
demo.suspenseStreamingCardDescription: See how a page shell can render before a slow server block finishes.
demo.supabaseArchitectureCardDescription: See where browser client, server client, Auth and Postgres fit into EventMap.
demo.supabaseRlsCardDescription: See how favorites table, grants and RLS policies protect user rows.
demo.supabaseAuthCardDescription: See how Magic Link, Google OAuth, callback route and safe redirect work together.
demo.liveSearchSourceDescription: SEO search and live search meet at a server boundary: the page keeps product UI while the service decides live or fallback.
demo.liveSearchSourceSeoTitle: SEO search is not the data source
demo.liveSearchSourceSeoDescription: The URL and SEO copy describe a landing page. The source boundary decides whether events come from Ticketmaster or controlled fallback.
demo.liveSearchSourceFallbackDescription: Without an API key, or when the live response is empty or invalid, EventMap still renders server HTML from controlled events.
demo.renderingStrategyCardDescription: Compare static, dynamic, ISR, no-store and client routes in EventMap.
demo.renderingStrategyDescription: EventMap uses different rendering strategies for content pages, live search, demo pages and client state.
demo.zodDescription: Raw items are checked before they reach EventCard UI.
demo.indexDescription: Small isolated pages for checking patterns before they move into EventMap.
demo.routesCardDescription: See how [locale], [id] and query strings appear in current EventMap routes.
demo.routesDescription: A map of dynamic routes that already exist in EventMap.
demo.routesLocaleNote: [locale] controls the interface language and URL structure.
demo.routesIdNote: [id] points to one event and is used by the detail page.
demo.routesQueryNote: Query strings like ?city=london or ?mode=empty refine a page without adding a new dynamic segment.
demo.lab1CardDescription: Read city from URL searchParams and filter demo events on the server.
demo.lab1Description: The selected city lives in the URL, so the page can render the filtered event list on the server.
demo.staticParamsCardDescription: See which locale and event id pairs are prepared for next build.
demo.staticParamsDescription: These pairs are known before build time and can be used to create event detail pages during next build.
demo.staticParamsLocaleNote: [locale] is already generated by the locale layout.
demo.staticParamsIdNote: [id] comes from the known fallback event list.
demo.staticParamsBuildNote: Run next build and find the generated /[locale]/events/[id] paths in the route output.
demo.zodCardDescription: Check raw items before they reach EventCard UI.
demo.fallbackCardDescription: Show fallback data instead of a red screen when external data fails.
demo.fallbackPageDescription: Switch modes to see how EventMap keeps rendering when external data is empty, invalid or rate limited.

fallbackMessage.ok: External data passed the safety checks.
fallbackMessage.empty: External API returned an empty list. EventMap shows an empty state.
fallbackMessage.invalid: External API returned an unexpected shape. EventMap shows fallback data.
fallbackMessage.rate-limit: External API rate limit was reached. EventMap shows fallback data.

demo.fallbackEmptyDescription: The page keeps its layout and shows a calm empty state instead of broken cards.
demo.supabaseCloudFavoritesCardDescription: See how guest localStorage favorites switch to account-based favorites with RLS.
demo.finalArchitectureCardDescription: See how Product EventMap, Demo Lab, server/client boundaries and backend options fit together.

search.title: Search events
search.description: Server-rendered search across controlled EventMap events.

sourceReasonText.live-results: Ticketmaster returned live events for this URL.
sourceReasonText.api-error: Ticketmaster request failed, so EventMap used controlled fallback.
sourceReasonText.empty-live-response: Ticketmaster returned an empty response, so EventMap used controlled fallback.
sourceReasonText.invalid-live-response: Ticketmaster response shape was invalid, so EventMap used controlled fallback.
sourceReasonText.empty-normalised-response: Ticketmaster events could not be normalised, so EventMap used controlled fallback.
sourceReasonText.controlled-fallback: Controlled fallback keeps search working without live data.

search.emptyDescription: Try another category, city or query.
search.seoPreviewDescription: In this lesson this is only an on-page preview. Real metadata, canonical tags, hreflang, sitemap and robots arrive later.
search.thinContentNote: Empty, query-only or out-of-range search URLs often become thin content. EventMap shows this as a noindex preview, but it does not add real robots rules yet.

eventDetail.notFoundDescription: The event may be unavailable or missing from the fallback data.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Your saved events live in this browser.
